title: senna cana var. pilosula
intro: Senna cana var. pilosula is a variety of the Senna cana plant, a species of flowering plant in the legume family, commonly known as a shrub-like bush. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its laxative effects, due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna cana var. pilosula include relieving constipation, reducing bloating, and promoting bowel movements. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, and tablets, which can be used to treat constipation and other gastrointestinal issues.
